name: html_runtime_adapter_v2_smoke_set
purpose: Regression set for HTML Runtime Adapter V2 before integrating candidate-only Verifier V2.
notes: Generated/local HTML reports are the primary target for Verifier V2.
Crawled HTML pages are included as stress cases for external-resource and publisher-shell handling.
The adapter captures DOM visual objects directly instead of slicing fixed-height pages.

samples.expected: Complete local HTML report with text, tables, and visual sections.
Static HTML visuals and table-like financial blocks.
One oversized visual; target crop should not be split by page height.
JavaScript-rendered canvas chart should be visible after runtime rendering.
Text should extract; missing image resources should be recorded as skipped visuals.
Cookie/share/modal shell should be cleaned while retaining main article text.
Main text should remain; missing resources may produce html_no_visual_objects warning.
